title: microtoena megacalyx
intro: Microtoena megacalyx, also known as the large-flowered microtoena, is a plant species native to the mountainous regions of Asia, particularly in China and Nepal. It belongs to the mint family (Lamiaceae) and is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant's health benefits are attributed to its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and improve digestion, making it a popular herbal remedy in traditional medicine. Microtoena megacalyx can be prepared into various herbal products, such as teas, infusions, and essential oils, which are used to treat various health conditions.
